تعلن وزارة الدفاع القطرية عن تعرض دولة قطر لهجوم بعدد (2) صاروخ باليستي من إيران، اليوم الأربعاء، ونجحت قواتنا المسلحة “بفضل من الله” بالتصدي لعدد (2) صاروخ باليستي، في محاولة استهداف مدينة رأس لفان الصناعية. حفظ الله قطر وأميرها وشعبها والمقيمين على أرضها. The Qatari Ministry of Defense announces that the State of Qatar was targeted today, Wednesday, by (2) ballistic missiles launched from Iran. Our Armed Forces, by the grace of God, successfully intercepted (2) ballistic missiles, which were aimed at Ras Laffan Industrial City. May Allah protect Qatar, its Amir, its people, and all residents on its land.

Following missile fire toward the State of Israel: In the Petah Tikva area, MDA EMTs and paramedics are treating and evacuating to Beilinson Hospital 3 casualties in mild condition, including a 44-year-old man and two children with blast injuries. Updates as required.

MDA Spokesperson: Following the missile fire toward the State of Israel: At this stage, no reports of casualties have been received. MDA EMTs and paramedics are searching locations where reports were received. Updates as required.

MDA Spokesperson: Following missile fire toward the State of Israel: At this stage, no reports have been received at MDA’s 101 emergency dispatch center. Updates as required. MDA calls on the public to follow the life-saving instructions of the Home Front Command.
